interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage including attraction overview, dates, hours, highlights, and primary calls-to-action plus newsletter promo.

todayHoursText.description: Human-friendly hours for today, e.g., 'Tonight: 4:00 pm – 11:00 pm'

primaryCtas.description: Primary actions like buy tickets, view schedule, plan visit (navigation handled by UI).

ctaLabel.description: Label such as 'Holiday Newsletter' or 'Stay Updated'

interfaces.name: getAboutAttractionContent
interfaces.description: Get rich content for the About the Attraction page: history, mission, dates, schedule summary, key experiences, and related links.

relatedPageLinks.description: Logical links to planning pages (navigation handled by UI).

interfaces.name: getFaqSections
interfaces.description: Get FAQ sections/categories for organizing frequently asked questions.

interfaces.name: getFaqItems
interfaces.description: Search or filter FAQ items by keyword and/or section.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword search across questions and answers.

parameters.name: sectionId
parameters.description: Filter FAQs by section id obtained from getFaqSections.

interfaces.name: getTicketTypesForListing
interfaces.description: Get list of active ticket types for the Tickets & Pricing overview page.

interfaces.name: getTicketTypeDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific ticket type including what's included, perks, and pricing.

parameters.name: ticketTypeId
parameters.description: TicketType.id of the ticket to view (comes from the ticket list selection).

formattedWhatsIncluded.description: HTML or markdown-safe formatted 'What’s Included' section.

interfaces.name: addTicketTypeToCart
interfaces.description: Add a non-date-specific ticket type product (e.g., General Admission, VIP Holiday Package) to the shopping cart.

parameters.name: ticketTypeId
parameters.description: TicketType.id to add.

parameters.name: ticketSelections
parameters.description: Ticket quantities by category, e.g., 2 adults.

interfaces.name: getSessionFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Tickets & Pricing sessions list (event types, audiences, time-of-day ranges).

timeOfDayRanges.description: Preset time-of-day buckets for filtering sessions.

startTime.description: Start time of bucket as 'HH:MM', e.g., '09:00'.

endTime.description: End time of bucket as 'HH:MM', e.g., '12:00'.

interfaces.name: getSessionSortOptions
interfaces.description: Get available sort options for the sessions list (e.g., start time, total price for a family of four).

interfaces.name: searchSessions
interfaces.description: Search timed sessions for the Tickets & Pricing page using date, time, audience, and event-type filters, with support for sorting by price, including family-of-four total price.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Inclusive start date filter as 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Inclusive end date filter as 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: eventTypes
parameters.description: Optional list of session event types to include, e.g., ['family_night', 'sensory_friendly'].

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Audience filter, e.g., 'families', 'adults', 'kids', 'all_ages'.

parameters.name: isSensoryFriendly
parameters.description: If true, only sensory-friendly sessions are returned.

parameters.name: isFamilyNight
parameters.description: If true, only Family Night sessions are returned.

parameters.name: startTimeFrom
parameters.description: Filter sessions whose start time is at or after this time, 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format.

parameters.name: startTimeTo
parameters.description: Filter sessions whose start time is at or before this time, 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort key, e.g., 'start_time_asc', 'family_of_4_price_asc', 'price_per_person_asc'.

adultPriceFrom.description: Lowest available adult price for this session.

childPriceFrom.description: Lowest available child price for this session, if any.

familyOf4PriceEstimate.description: Estimated total price for 2 adults + 2 children (or best matching combination).

interfaces.name: getSessionBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Get full booking information for a specific session, including date/time, notes, ticket categories with pricing, and available add-ons.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session.id selected from the sessions list.

ticketCategories.description: Ticket categories (adult, child, etc.) and pricing for this session.

addOns.description: Optional Session add-ons that can be purchased with this session.

interfaces.name: addSessionTicketsToCart
interfaces.description: Configure and add tickets for a specific timed session to the shopping cart, with optional selection/deselection of add-ons. Handles cart creation internally.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session.id being purchased.

parameters.name: ticketSelections
parameters.description: Ticket quantities by category for this session.

unitPrice.description: Unit price used to calculate totals for this selection.

parameters.name: addOnIds
parameters.description: List of SessionAddon.id values selected for this session. If provided, overrides any default selections, so pass an empty array to add no add-ons.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current shopping cart contents and pricing summary for the Shopping Cart page.

description.description: Human-readable summary, e.g., 'Family Night 12/18 5:30 pm – 2 Adults, 2 Children'.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemTickets
interfaces.description: Update ticket quantities for an existing cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: CartItem.id to update.

parameters.name: ticketSelections
parameters.description: Updated ticket quantities by category.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the shopping cart and return the updated summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: CartItem.id to remove.

interfaces.name: getScheduleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Schedule & Activities page (audiences, categories, location types, and time-range presets).

categories.description: Activity categories such as Santa, light shows, workshops.

timeRangePresets.description: Common time-range presets like '4:00 pm–8:00 pm'.

interfaces.name: searchActivities
interfaces.description: Search scheduled activities for a specific date with filters for audience, time range, category, and location type.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to view activities for, as 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Audience filter, e.g., 'families', 'adults', 'kids', 'all_ages'.

parameters.name: timeRangeStart
parameters.description: Only activities starting at or after this time, 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format.

parameters.name: timeRangeEnd
parameters.description: Only activities starting at or before this time, 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Activity category, e.g., 'santa_experience', 'light_show', 'workshop_craft'.

parameters.name: locationType
parameters.description: Location type filter, e.g., 'indoor', 'outdoor', 'mixed'.

interfaces.name: getActivityDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific activity including description, timing, location, audience suitability, and accessibility notes.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: Activity.id selected from the schedule list.

interfaces.name: addActivityToItinerary
interfaces.description: Add a specific activity to the user's 'My Night' itinerary, creating or selecting an itinerary for that activity's date.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: Activity.id to add.

interfaces.name: getItinerary
interfaces.description: Get the current 'My Night' itinerary for a given date (or the most recently used date if none specified), with activities ordered chronologically and conflict information.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date filter as 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If omitted, returns the most recently updated itinerary.

interfaces.name: removeItineraryItem
interfaces.description: Remove an activity from the 'My Night' itinerary and return the updated itinerary.

parameters.name: itineraryItemId
parameters.description: ItineraryItem.id to remove.

interfaces.name: getAccessibilityOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the Accessibility page including information on wheelchair access, sensory-friendly offerings, parking, and restrooms.

interfaces.name: listAccessibleEntrances
interfaces.description: List entrances with accessibility details for display in the Accessibility page 'Entrances' section and map.

interfaces.name: getEntranceDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific entrance, such as 'North Gate – Accessible'.

parameters.name: entranceId
parameters.description: Entrance.id selected from the entrances list or map.

interfaces.name: listAccessibleViewingAreas
interfaces.description: List accessible viewing areas for display in the Accessibility page.

interfaces.name: getAccessibleViewingAreaDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific accessible viewing area, including description, seating type, and notes.

parameters.name: accessibleViewingAreaId
parameters.description: AccessibleViewingArea.id selected from the list.

interfaces.name: submitAccessibilityInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a contact message from the Accessibility page to the accessibility team, typically with topic 'accessibility_mobility'.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Contact topic, usually 'accessibility_mobility' for this form.

parameters.name: relatedContext
parameters.description: Optional text referencing a related entity, e.g., 'North Gate – Accessible'.

interfaces.name: getGroupsOverviewContent
interfaces.description: Get explanatory content for the Groups & Parties page including group benefits, minimum group sizes, and discount information.

interfaces.name: searchGroupSessionOptions
interfaces.description: Search group-bookable session options for the Groups & Parties booking interface using group size, date, and time filters.

parameters.name: groupSize
parameters.description: Number of guests for the group, e.g., 15.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Preferred date as 'YYYY-MM-DD'. If omitted, returns options across multiple dates.

parameters.name: startTimeFrom
parameters.description: Only group options starting at or after this time, 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.

parameters.name: startTimeTo
parameters.description: Only group options starting at or before this time, 'HH:MM' 24-hour format.

parameters.name: dayOfWeek
parameters.description: Optional day-of-week filter, e.g., 'friday'.

parameters.name: mustHaveGroupDiscount
parameters.description: If true, only options with a group discount are returned.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort key, e.g., 'price_per_person_asc', 'start_time_asc'.

interfaces.name: getGroupSessionDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a selected group session option, including date/time, pricing for a specified group size, and available payment methods.

parameters.name: groupSessionOptionId
parameters.description: GroupSessionOption.id selected from the group search results.

parameters.name: groupSize
parameters.description: Optional group size for recalculating pricing; if omitted, defaults to the option's minimum or previously chosen size.

session.description: Underlying Session if the group option maps to a standard session; may be null.

interfaces.name: createGroupBooking
interfaces.description: Create a group booking for a selected group session option with chosen payment method and contact information. Does not perform online payment.

parameters.name: groupSessionOptionId
parameters.description: GroupSessionOption.id of the selected group slot.

parameters.name: groupSize
parameters.description: Final group size being booked.

parameters.name: paymentMethod
parameters.description: Payment method, e.g., 'pay_on_arrival', 'invoice_later', 'pay_online'.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterSignupOptions
interfaces.description: Get available interest categories and frequency options for the Holiday Newsletter signup page.

interestOptions.description: Newsletter interest categories including 'Family Activities' and 'Special Offers & Discounts'.

interfaces.name: createNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Submit newsletter preferences and subscriber information to create a Holiday Newsletter subscription.

parameters.name: interests
parameters.description: Array of interest enums selected, e.g., ['family_activities', 'special_offers_discounts'].

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Preferred update interval, e.g., 'weekly', 'monthly', 'occasional'.

interfaces.name: getGettingHereContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Getting Here & Parking page covering driving directions, public transit overview, and parking information.

interfaces.name: searchTransitRoutes
interfaces.description: Search public transit routes serving the attraction, filterable by mode (e.g., bus), walking time, and service hours.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Transport mode filter, e.g., 'bus', 'train', 'subway', 'tram', 'ferry'.

parameters.name: maxWalkingTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum acceptable walking time from stop to attraction in minutes.

parameters.name: minServiceEndTime
parameters.description: Earliest acceptable last departure time as 'HH:MM' in 24-hour format, e.g., '22:00' for 10:00 pm.

parameters.name: dayOfWeek
parameters.description: Optional day-of-week filter, e.g., 'friday', 'saturday'.

interfaces.name: getTransitRouteDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific transit route such as a bus route, including walking time, service hours, and notes.

parameters.name: transitRouteId
parameters.description: TransitRoute.id selected from the transit routes list or map.

interfaces.name: getContactTopics
interfaces.description: Get topic/subject options for the Contact Us form, including 'Transportation & Parking' and other categories.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact message from the Contact Us page with selected topic, name, email, and message.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Contact topic enum, e.g., 'transportation_parking', 'tickets_pricing', 'group_bookings', 'accessibility_mobility', 'general_question', 'other'.

parameters.name: relatedContext
parameters.description: Optional free-text reference to a related entity, e.g., 'Bus Route 42'.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current ShoppingCart or create a new one if none exists, storing its identifier locally.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute subtotal, taxes, fees, and total for the ShoppingCart after any changes to CartItems.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateItineraryForDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create an Itinerary entity for a given date for the single current user.

helperFunctions.name: _detectItineraryConflicts
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to check for overlapping Activity time ranges within an itinerary and mark conflicts for display.

helperFunctions.name: _estimateFamilyOf4SessionPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute an estimated price for 2 adults and 2 children for a Session using SessionTicketPrice data.

helperFunctions.name: _filterSessionsByTimeAndDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply date and time-of-day filters when searching sessions.

helperFunctions.name: _findNextSaturdayDate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to determine the next upcoming Saturday date relative to today, used for sensory-friendly Saturday searches.

helperFunctions.name: _filterTransitRoutesByServiceWindow
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter TransitRoute records by walking time and serviceEndTime >= requested cutoff (e.g., 22:00).

helperFunctions.name: _createContactMessageRecord
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a ContactMessage entity with the appropriate source (e.g., 'accessibility_page', 'contact_page').
